column2: Verify CAA Rejects Variation Application When Non-Compliance Demonstrated
column3: ['Submit an application for a variation. ', 'Fail to demonstrate compliance with RAE(PC) scheme after implementation. ', 'CAA reviews and rejects the variation application. ']
column4: ['The entity submits the required documentation and information to apply for a variation. ', 'The entity is unable to provide evidence that the proposed change will continue to meet the requirements of the RAE(PC) scheme after implementation. ', 'The CAA evaluates the submitted documentation, finds non-compliance with the RAE(PC) scheme, and officially rejects the variation application. ']
